sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57880" key="klhropalh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κληροπᾰλής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n57880.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">distributed by shaking the lots</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μοῖραι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg004.perseus-grc1:129" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Merc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">129</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
